directive:
Assemble the pull request description from batch results and update the PR. Do NOT mark the PR ready in this state — gh pr ready runs in the next state (plan_completion) after the cascade pulls the chain to its strict-mode passing state.

1. Run: koto context get execute-diamond-test batch_final_view
2. For each child in batch_final_view include: name, outcome, reason (if failed or skipped), reason_source, skipped_because_chain (if skipped)
3. Update the PR description with gh pr edit
4. Submit finalization_status: updated with pr_url, or finalization_status: update_failed if the edit step fails
